creator: schot@a-eskwadraat.nl
text:
Hello Nikos,

Sorry for my not responding to this PR sooner, but I've been busy. I
really like the idea of extending the dwm-port with patches.

My biggest problem is the amount of work it takes to update all patches
to new upstream releases. The result is that I can garEspecially since any combination of patches
should work and they all operate on a single .c file. 

I also doubt the semi-official status of the patches on the dwm-site, it
is a wiki-like site with no real moderation were every idiot (even me
;)) can put his patches on.

So I agree to close this PR. But still thanks for your patch, it has
given me a few ideas to perhaps do this in another way. 

Regards,
-- 
Jeroen Schot
